comments.author: vinicioslc
comments.body:
Hello @Siemienik,Do you have any suspicion of what may be happening? I tested the example posted by @dgofman (open and save file) and is actually modifying the layout, as in the case of the company that i work for.

The layout style still better in libre office instead of excel
Before open and save (Libre Office)

After open and save (Excel)

comments.author: Siemienik
